base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of font_palette_yellow — a ui (logo) from 1980 pac man. Yellow-tinted font variant — used for PAC-MAN character label + OIKAKE/SHADOW labels in attract-mode character-listing. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Yellow-tinted font variant — used for PAC-MAN character label + OIKAKE/SHADOW labels in attract-mode character-listing
